stemHtml: Which of the following options is correct with regards to the “limit load" of an aircraft?

options.a: It should be 150% of the maximum load expected during flight.
options.b: It should be 150% of the “ultimate load".
options.c: It should be the maximum load expected during the flight and the aircraft should be capable of withstanding 150% of it.
options.d: It should be 150% of what the aircraft is expected to experience in flight.
